dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The system maintained 100% schema validation success across all reasoning spans. The presence of 'rules-context-loader' and 'alignment-engine' stages, both completing with 'ok' status, demonstrates consistent enforcement of the architectural governance framework.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Increased token count in 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' (56,365 tokens vs 48,971 baseline) suggests a deeper analysis of the cause-effect chain between incoming requirements and architectural state evolution.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment engine processed over 30k tokens, a notable increase from the baseline, indicating a more complex resolution of trade-offs. The successful transition to 'architecture-intent-generator' confirms that identified tensions were reconciled into a concrete plan.
